test-case.description: should output one result per required permission
test-case.name: Test-AzureAppRegistration.ps1.All Permissions Granted.should output one result per required permission

test-case.description: should mark all permissions as granted
test-case.name: Test-AzureAppRegistration.ps1.All Permissions Granted.should mark all permissions as granted

test-case.description: should include all expected output properties
test-case.name: Test-AzureAppRegistration.ps1.All Permissions Granted.should include all expected output properties

test-case.description: should set Type to Application for all results
test-case.name: Test-AzureAppRegistration.ps1.All Permissions Granted.should set Type to Application for all results

test-case.description: should populate AppId and TenantId from parameters
test-case.name: Test-AzureAppRegistration.ps1.All Permissions Granted.should populate AppId and TenantId from parameters

test-case.description: should populate DisplayName from the service principal
test-case.name: Test-AzureAppRegistration.ps1.All Permissions Granted.should populate DisplayName from the service principal

test-case.description: should mark Files.ReadWrite.All as granted
test-case.name: Test-AzureAppRegistration.ps1.Missing Permissions.should mark Files.ReadWrite.All as granted

test-case.description: should mark User.Read.All as not granted
test-case.name: Test-AzureAppRegistration.ps1.Missing Permissions.should mark User.Read.All as not granted

test-case.description: should mark all permissions as not granted
test-case.name: Test-AzureAppRegistration.ps1.No Permissions Granted.should mark all permissions as not granted

test-case.description: should throw when service principal is not found
test-case.name: Test-AzureAppRegistration.ps1.Error Handling.should throw when service principal is not found

test-case.description: should disconnect from Graph after processing
test-case.name: Test-AzureAppRegistration.ps1.Error Handling.should disconnect from Graph after processing

test-case.description: should map Editor permission to write role
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Permission Mapping.should map Editor permission to write role

test-case.description: should map Viewer permission to read role
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Permission Mapping.should map Viewer permission to read role

test-case.description: should map Co-owner permission to write role
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Permission Mapping.should map Co-owner permission to write role

test-case.description: should skip Previewer permission (maps to null)
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Permission Mapping.should skip Previewer permission (maps to null)

test-case.description: should fail when collaborator login is empty
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Permission Mapping.should fail when collaborator login is empty

test-case.description: should normalize All Files prefix in paths
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Path Handling.should normalize All Files prefix in paths

test-case.description: should handle paths with spaces
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Path Handling.should handle paths with spaces

test-case.description: should handle paths with parentheses
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Path Handling.should handle paths with parentheses

test-case.description: should convert backslashes to forward slashes
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Path Handling.should convert backslashes to forward slashes

test-case.description: should output custom objects with all required properties
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Parameters and Output.should output custom objects with all required properties

test-case.description: should set IsValidAccount and OneDriveProvisioned to true on success
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Parameters and Output.should set IsValidAccount and OneDriveProvisioned to true on success

test-case.description: should support -WhatIf parameter
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Parameters and Output.should support -WhatIf parameter

test-case.description: should create log file in specified folder
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Parameters and Output.should create log file in specified folder

test-case.description: should create log folder if it does not exist
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Parameters and Output.should create log folder if it does not exist

test-case.description: should throw when InputFile does not exist
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Error Handling.should throw when InputFile does not exist

test-case.description: should output Failed results when drive lookup fails for a user
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Error Handling.should output Failed results when drive lookup fails for a user

test-case.description: should mark item as not existing when 404 error occurs
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Error Handling.should mark item as not existing when 404 error occurs

test-case.description: should provide actionable error when OneDrive is not provisioned
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Error Handling.should provide actionable error when OneDrive is not provisioned

test-case.description: should set IsValidAccount to false when user account is not found
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Error Handling.should set IsValidAccount to false when user account is not found

test-case.description: should set IsValidAccount to false when user account is disabled
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Error Handling.should set IsValidAccount to false when user account is disabled

test-case.description: should catch accessDenied as unprovisioned OneDrive
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Error Handling.should catch accessDenied as unprovisioned OneDrive

test-case.description: should report insufficient permissions when app lacks User.Read.All
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Error Handling.should report insufficient permissions when app lacks User.Read.All

test-case.description: should process multiple rows and apply permissions
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - End-to-End Workflow.should process multiple rows and apply permissions

test-case.description: should apply correct roles for different permission levels
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - End-to-End Workflow.should apply correct roles for different permission levels

test-case.description: should disconnect from Graph after processing
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - End-to-End Workflow.should disconnect from Graph after processing

test-case.description: should process all unique owners when UserToProcess is not specified
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Multi-User Processing.should process all unique owners when UserToProcess is not specified

test-case.description: should apply correct roles per owner when processing all users
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Multi-User Processing.should apply correct roles per owner when processing all users

test-case.description: should continue processing remaining owners when one fails
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Multi-User Processing.should continue processing remaining owners when one fails

test-case.description: should filter to single owner when UserToProcess is specified
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Multi-User Processing.should filter to single owner when UserToProcess is specified

test-case.description: should upload files and create folders
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - UploadFiles Switch.should upload files and create folders

test-case.description: should list files that would be uploaded with -WhatIf
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - UploadFiles Switch.should list files that would be uploaded with -WhatIf

test-case.description: should output upload result objects with expected properties
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - UploadFiles Switch.should output upload result objects with expected properties

test-case.description: should throw when user local folder does not exist
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - UploadFiles Switch.should throw when user local folder does not exist

test-case.description: should not upload when UploadFiles is not specified
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - UploadFiles Switch.should not upload when UploadFiles is not specified

test-case.description: should fail upload for files exceeding 4 MB
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - UploadFiles Switch.should fail upload for files exceeding 4 MB

test-case.description: should skip collaborators with domains not in AllowedDomains
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - AllowedDomains Validation.should skip collaborators with domains not in AllowedDomains

test-case.description: should allow collaborators with domains in AllowedDomains
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - AllowedDomains Validation.should allow collaborators with domains in AllowedDomains

test-case.description: should allow all domains when AllowedDomains is not specified
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - AllowedDomains Validation.should allow all domains when AllowedDomains is not specified

test-case.description: should perform case-insensitive domain matching
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - AllowedDomains Validation.should perform case-insensitive domain matching

test-case.description: should succeed after transient 429 with Retry-After in error details
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Retry-After Header Parsing.should succeed after transient 429 with Retry-After in error details

test-case.description: should fail after exhausting all retry attempts
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Retry-After Header Parsing.should fail after exhausting all retry attempts

test-case.description: should retry up to 6 times (new default) before failing
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Retry-After Header Parsing.should retry up to 6 times (new default) before failing

test-case.description: should deduplicate identical CSV rows and process each unique row once
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - CSV Deduplication.should deduplicate identical CSV rows and process each unique row once

test-case.description: should keep distinct rows with different collaborators
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - CSV Deduplication.should keep distinct rows with different collaborators

test-case.description: should throw when session falls back to delegated auth
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Post-Connection Auth Validation.should throw when session falls back to delegated auth

test-case.description: should throw when session uses wrong ClientId
test-case.name: Update-UserFile.ps1.Script Execution - Post-Connection Auth Validation.should throw when session uses wrong ClientId
